task_completion.description: Navigate to the edit page for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the GeoServer 'Edit Layer' page, and the layer name 'ne:ne_countries' is visible in the title or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Enable HTTP Response Cache Headers and set the cache time to 86400 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the layer configuration (typically under the 'Publishing' tab), the checkbox for 'Enable HTTP Response Cache Headers' is checked, and the 'Cache Time' input field contains the value '86400'.
Under the WMS Attribution settings, the 'Attribution' text area or field contains the exact text 'Provided by Natural Earth'.

task_completion.description: Configure the WMS Attribution logo URL and type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the WMS Attribution settings, the 'Logo URL' field contains 'http://localhost:8080/geoserver/ne_logo.png' and the 'Logo Type' field or dropdown is set to 'image/png'.

task_completion.description: Configure the WMS Attribution logo width and height.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the WMS Attribution settings, the 'Logo Width' field contains '88' and the 'Logo Height' field contains '31'.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the page, or the screen shows the Layers list with a success message indicating the layer was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the GeoServer GUI (http://localhost:8080/geoserver), rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the genuine GeoServer form fields, not just typed into a text editor or a blank document.

integrity.description: The changes were applied to the correct layer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are explicitly made on the 'ne:ne_countries' layer, not a newly created dummy layer or a different existing layer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires setting the cache time to exactly 86400 seconds (24 hours). The WMS Attribution title must be 'Provided by Natural Earth'. The logo URL must be 'http://localhost:8080/geoserver/ne_logo.png' with MIME type 'image/png'. The logo dimensions must be exactly 88 for width and 31 for height.
